productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men HT Drir G Ls Navy Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Navy blue round neck full sleeved t-shirt made of 70% cotton, 30% polyester, softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, brand name printed in red in bold lettering on the chest, brand badge on the nape of the neck, and brand name and logo printed on the left sleeve Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on prints/trims/embroidery Do not dry clean This navy blue full-sleeves t-shirt from adidas is perfect for those days when there is a slight nip in the air...when it's a little chilly, but not cold enough to sport a jacket. Protect your arms from the cold, dust, and sun in a stylish sporty tee. Pair it with snart jeans and casual shoes for a day out with the cool gang. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
